color_filter_def_t(3) Library Functions Manual color_filter_def_t(3)

NAME

color_filter_def_t - Color filter metadata structure.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/video/rgba/color_filter.h>

Data Fields


const char * name
Human-readable filter name (e.g., matrix-green"). const char * cli_name
CLI argument name (e.g., matrix-green"). uint8_t r
uint8_t g
uint8_t b
RGB color values for this filter. bool foreground_on_bg
true=color on white, false=white on color

Detailed Description

Color filter metadata structure.

Contains all information about a color filter including its name, CLI identifier, RGB color values, and rendering mode.

Definition at line 80 of file color_filter.h.

Field Documentation

uint8_t color_filter_def_t::b

RGB color values for this filter.
